addresses.description: Addresses that are eligible to sign the consumption of this output.

consumedOnChainId.description: Blockchain ID on which this output is consumed on.

consumingTxHash.description: Transaction ID that consumed this output.

createdOnChainId.description: Blockchain ID on which this output is created on.

consumingBlockNumber.description: Block height in which the transaction consuming this UTXO was included

consumingBlockTimestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds at which this UTXO is used in a consuming transaction

platformLocktime.description: Timestamp in seconds after which this UTXO can be consumed

outputIndex.description: The index of the UTXO in the transaction

stakeableLocktime.description: Timestamp in seconds before which a UTXO can only be used for staking transactions. After stakeable locktime, a UTXO can be used for anything

threshold.description: The minimum number of signatures required to spend this UTXO

txHash.description: The hash of the transaction that created this UTXO

utxoEndTimestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds after which the staked UTXO will be unlocked.

utxoStartTimestamp.description: Timestamp in seconds at which the staked UTXO was locked.
